headline: 3 Consumer Stocks That Fall Short
summary: Most consumer discretionary businesses succeed or fail based on the broader economy. This sensitive demand profile can cause discretionary stocks to plummet when macro uncertainty enters the fray, and over the past six months, the industry has shed 10.1%. This drop was worse than the S&P 500’s 3.2% loss.

headline: Peachtree Group and Lone Star PACE Facilitate $11 Million in C-PACE Funds for Beaumont Hotel Renovation
summary: Courtyard/Element Dual-Branded Hotel C-PACE financing will transform the MCM Elegante hotel in Beaumont, Texas, into a dual-branded Marriott property. headline: MREG and McCourt Partners break ground on $7bn Halo Vista project
summary: The Halo Vista project will add new industrial, residential and retail space next to the TSMC campus in Arizona.
